messages.content:
Explain why authentication alone does not effectively mitigate this vulnerability.

SQL Injection vulnerability discovered in Gila CMS 1.15.4 and earlier allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary web scripts via the Area parameter under the Administration>Widget tab after the login portal.

Authentication alone does not prevent SQL Injection since the vulnerability is exploited after user login. Secure coding practices and proper query handling are essential to address the underlying issue.
